---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest hardware enablement or an improvement for this OpenWrt target
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Reminder: this is a personal fork. Upstreaming to OpenWrt / the Linux kernel is
out of scope here (see CONTRIBUTING.md). Requests should be about what this
target should support on the Orange Pi RV2 / SpacemiT K1.
-->

## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or hardware enablement (e.g. UHS microSD,
USB, PCIe/NVMe, additional package profile…).

## Why / use case

What does this enable?

## Hardware / kernel involved

Which SoC block, driver, or device-tree node does this touch? Any upstream
mainline commit to backport (with hash), or reference driver?

## Relevant references

Upstream commits, `docs/` entries, existing STATUS.md notes, forum threads.

## Willing to test on hardware?

<!-- Do you have a board and can you flash + validate this, or is this a request
for someone else to implement/test? -->
